title: Yoga research review
headline: Yoga research review
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of yoga examined clinical research. The methods and results of those studies are briefly summarized along with their limitations and suggestions for future research.
keyFindings: The methods and results of those studies are briefly summarized along with their limitations and suggestions for future research.
limitations: The methods and results of those studies are briefly summarized along with their limitations and suggestions for future research.
Shorter sessions should be investigated for cost-effectiveness and for daily practice.
Multiple physical and physiological measures need to be added to the self-report research protocols and potential underlying mechanisms need to be further explored.
Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
